title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | June 24, 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: PSU, decent gains after recent correction
recommendations.detail: As a PSU it won't be a multibagger, but decent gains are visible after the recent correction. He called it a good company and one of the caller's better picks.

recommendations.note: Terminals demand up; good bet at current levels
recommendations.detail: A good company being promoted as an investment idea, with some ifs-and-buts. Logistics are fine and demand for terminals companies has risen. Good bet at current levels; after a decent June-quarter result the stock has signs of slowly gaining to 300-plus.

recommendations.note: Not a buying zone now; enter only after results
recommendations.detail: Broke out from the 800-850 band to 1,100, then corrected to ~955. A hyped but good new-gen stock. This is not a buying zone; the buying zone is 850-880, which it may not reach unless the quarter's result is weak. Enter only after seeing the results.

recommendations.note: BESS dark horse; buy near 200 with stop-loss ~180
recommendations.detail: Earlier flagged as a dark-horse idea; it is in the Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) segment with a developing order book, and execution is the key. The segment is being re-rated. Buy close to 200 with a stop-loss around 180.

recommendations.note: Metal cycle peaked; exit on bounce
recommendations.detail: A hyped PSU monopoly, but the metal cycle has peaked and it is already below 500, a clear sign of weakness. Better to exit once it comes to around 530-540; a close below 490 could see it fall to 430-440. Only traders should trade it.

recommendations.note: Silver correcting; exit on any rally
recommendations.detail: Silver, one of its key profit-making units, is correcting, and the stock has made lower tops and lower bottoms over the last six months, fizzling out from ~600+. Use any temporary rally closer to 560-570 as an opportunity to exit.

recommendations.note: VC/PE bets may materialise; accumulate below 1000 medium term
recommendations.detail: Yesterday's rally was driven by news that some of its VC/PE investments (over Rs 1,200 cr across firms) may materialise with good returns, with a possible AI-company windfall like Zomato earlier. Keep a watch and accumulate below 1,000 for the medium term.

No connection to the Jio Platforms IPO. The company is shifting from retail financing toward a BlackRock-type / fund-management model, which will take time. Wait if you have patience; if not, exit, since many other NBFCs (Shriram Finance, M&M Finance, L&T Finance) gave far stronger returns.

Hold for the long term; the story has only just begun. It presented at the Go India conference (alongside Standard Engineering) and reportedly drew strong mutual-fund interest. Small-quantity holders should hold; those with very large quantities may book a little profit.

recommendations.note: Best times over; exit on bounce
recommendations.detail: The best of times are over for this stock; he doubts an immediate return to its old glory of 1,000-plus unless dramatic events, product announcements or results appear. Stay cautious and exit once it comes close to 880-900.

recommendations.note: Preferred over Capri Global for 1-year hold; stronger promoter
recommendations.detail: For a one-year single pick between Capri Global and Poonawalla, stick with the stronger group, Poonawalla, because the promoter has financial strength. Capri Global outperforms operationally and is near its all-time high, but the stronger promoter is preferred.

recommendations.note: Weak stock near 52-week low; exit on rallies
recommendations.detail: Flagged as a highly risky bet at listing. It is a weak stock near its 52-week low that didn't rise even in the two-month mid/small-cap rally; it should have been exited in the rallies. A hype-driven IPO listing.

recommendations.note: Stabilising; batteries space should see some movement
recommendations.detail: The stock was very volatile but is now slowly stabilising. As of now, hold, because the batteries space should see at least some movement in such stocks.
